table.connections: Family enjoys reasonable connections within its community
table.allies_contacts_enemies_rivals: Roll 1d4. On a 1 you gain an Ally; 2 a Contact; 3 an Enemy; 4 a Rival

table.connections: Family is well connected in the community and is known to those commanding local power
As above, but the family also enjoys some status with those commanding regional power
As above but the family also enjoys some status with those commanding national power
table.allies_contacts_enemies_rivals: As above but roll four times

table.reputation: Family's reputation is sound, but there may be a few skeletons and secrets better left locked away
Family enjoys a good reputation although there may be those either inside or outside the family who could tarnish it
Family's reputation is untarnished and of excellent standing

allies_contacts_rivals_enemies.ally: A friend, colleague or relation who shares the same cause and will offer help and guidance when called upon.
allies_contacts_rivals_enemies.contact: People of potential influence the character knows. An acquaintance who can help, not one who will.
allies_contacts_rivals_enemies.rival: Those who oppose the character for the same or similar goals, and will attempt to interfere with or harass him.
allies_contacts_rivals_enemies.enemy: Someone who wishes the character harm, and will go to lengths to ensure the character suffers.

personal_connections.description: Characters adventuring together can form personal connections explaining why they are together.
personal_connections.group_luck_points: Starts at 2, increases by 1 per character who has formed a personal connection within the group. Can only be drawn upon when actively helping another character.

marriage.children: 1d4-1 children, ages 1d4 each. Identical age rolls = twins/triplets.
